papers.title_en: Tight-Frame Reconstruction for Acoustic Intensity Estimation Using Cardioid Microphone Pairs
papers.evidence: 使用心形麦克风对的紧框架重建用于声强估计
papers.tldr: 传统压力差声强估计对麦克风间距与波长关系敏感，心形-心形方法虽降低此敏感性，但实际麦克风指向性非理想导致方向依赖误差。本文提出基于球形紧框架的麦克风配置，沿多轴测量方向声强分量，结合勒让德/球谐展开表示指向性误差并引入泄漏度量。数值模拟表明紧框架通过几何平均有效抑制方向依赖误差，泄漏度量成功预测误差影响，且在较大麦克风间距下仍能实现宽带声强估计。该框架提供可解释且实用的声强测量方法，适用于定向麦克风阵列。
papers.abstract_en: This paper investigates acoustic intensity estimation using pairs of cardioid microphones based on the cardioid-cardioid (C-C) method. Unlike conventional pressure-difference techniques, the C-C method is intrinsically less sensitive to the relationship between microphone spacing and acoustic wavelength. However, practical microphones inevitably deviate from ideal cardioid directivity, producing direction-dependent estimation errors.   To improve robustness against such errors, a measurement framework based on spherical tight-frame microphone configurations is proposed. Directional intensity components measured along multiple axes are combined to reconstruct the three-dimensional acoustic intensity vector. Furthermore, directivity errors are represented using Legendre polynomial and spherical harmonic expansions, and a geometry-dependent leakage metric is introduced to quantify the error-suppression capability of different microphone arrangements.   Theoretical analysis and numerical simulations demonstrate that tight-frame configurations effectively suppress direction-dependent errors through geometric averaging. The proposed leakage metric successfully predicts the influence of microphone directivity imperfections on the reconstructed intensity vector. The results further indicate that accurate wide-band acoustic-intensity estimation can be achieved even with relatively large microphone spacings, which are generally impractical in conventional pressure-difference approaches. % The proposed framework provides a physically interpretable and practically useful approach for acoustic intensity measurement using directional microphone arrays.

papers.title_en: DOA Estimation from One-Bit Magnitude-Only Measurements via Sign-Consistency Optimization
papers.authors: Xicheng Lu, Wei Liu, Akram Alomainy
papers.evidence: 利用符号一致性优化从一位幅度测量中实现DOA估计
papers.tldr: 针对一比特幅度测量下的DOA估计问题，直接组合幅度测量与一比特量化会导致恒定输出。通过引入符号一致性优化框架，采用光滑Logistic代理函数并联合l2,1范数正则化以促进稀疏性，再以近端梯度算法求解。实验表明，该方法在无相位误差时与相干方法精度相当，在严重相位误差下仍保持鲁棒性，避免了阵列校准需求。
papers.abstract_en: The direction-of-arrival (DOA) estimation problem using one-bit quantized magnitude-only measurements is studied, where magnitude-only measurements offer robustness against phase errors, thereby avoiding the need for array calibration, while one-bit quantization significantly reduces hardware cost and system complexity. As their direct combination results in meaningless constant measurements, we formulate a sign-consistency optimization problem using a smooth logistic surrogate with ell_2,1-norm regularization to promote joint sparsity. To solve this problem, a proximal-gradient algorithm is developed with guaranteed convergence to a critical point. Numerical results demonstrate that the proposed method achieves accuracy comparable to coherent one-bit baselines under ideal conditions, while maintaining robust performance under severe phase errors that substantially impair coherent methods.

papers.title_en: What VGGT Knows About Overlap: Probing Geometric Foundation Models for Co-Visibility
papers.authors: Filippo Ziliotto, Luciano Serafini, Lamberto Ballan, Tommaso Campari
papers.evidence: 几何基础模型用于共视性判断，与传感器对齐和几何校准相关
papers.tldr: 3D重建中判断图像对是否共视是基础难题。研究发现几何基础模型VGGT隐式编码了共视性，其层次表示中早期层构建场景，后期层专门推理共视性，第17层为负锚点。据此提出Co-VGGT，冻结VGGT并训练轻量混合专家头（<7.5M参数）仅从RGB分类共视性。在Co-VisiON基准上，成对准确率超人类基线25%，多视图提升10%，预测校准良好（ECE=0.030），可直接用于SfM和SLAM。
papers.abstract_en: A fundamental challenge in 3D reconstruction and robotic localization is co-visibility: determining which image pairs share overlapping visible surfaces, particularly in scenarios with minimal overlap. We demonstrate that VGGT implicitly encodes co-visibility as an emergent behavior: without any supervision for this task, its internal representations exhibit a clear hierarchical structure mirroring that of large language models, i.e. early layers build a 3D-aware scene representation, while late layers act as dedicated co-visibility reasoners. In particular, we identify layer L17 as a negative anchor that consistently routes non-co-visible pairs for this backbone, regardless of the evaluation setting, providing task-grounded evidence of layer specialization in a geometry-grounded foundation model. Building on this, we introduce Co-VGGT, which freezes VGGT and trains only a lightweight layer-wise mixture-of-experts head (less than 7.5M parameters) to classify co-visibility from RGB alone, treating each layer as a specialized expert whose geometric abstraction is adaptively weighted per input pair. On the Co-VisiON benchmark, Co-VGGT surpasses the human annotation baseline and improves over prior work by more than 25% pairwise and 10% multiview. Pairwise predictions are well-calibrated (ECE=0.030), enabling direct use as edge weights in visibility graphs for downstream SfM and SLAM pipelines without post-hoc correction. Code and data are available.

papers.title_en: Spatial-Frequency Cued Generative Fixed-Filter Active Noise Control Based on Deep Learning in Reverberant Environments
papers.authors: Boxiang Wang, Haowen Li, Dongyuan Shi, Junwei Ji, Ziyi Yang, Zhengding Luo, Woon-Seng Gan
papers.evidence: 基于深度学习的空间线索估计实现声源定位
papers.tldr: 传统生成式固定滤波器主动噪声控制（GFANC）忽略了噪声源的空间信息，在混响环境中性能受限。本文提出空间-频率线索GFANC（SF-GFANC）方法，设计多任务卷积循环神经网络同时估计声源距离、仰角和方位角等空间线索，并预测子控制滤波器组合权重作为频率线索，联合指导控制滤波器生成。理论分析了混响环境下最优控制滤波器需考虑三维空间条件。在模拟和实测声学路径上的评估表明，CRNN对未见声学环境和噪声类型具有鲁棒性，且SF-GFANC在混响环境中处理不同三维位置和频率特征的噪声源时优于代表性ANC算法。
papers.abstract_en: Generative fixed-filter active noise control (GFANC) effectively attenuates noise with diverse frequency characteristics through the combination of sub control filters. However, it does not incorporate the spatial information of the noise source, which limits its performance, particularly in reverberant environments. To address this limitation, this paper proposes a novel spatial-frequency cued GFANC (SF-GFANC) method that exploits both three-dimensional (3D) spatial and frequency information of the noise source. Specifically, a multi-task convolutional recurrent neural network (CRNN) is designed to estimate the source distance, elevation angle, and azimuth angle as spatial cues, while predicting the combination weights of sub control filters as frequency cues. These spatial-frequency cues jointly guide the generation of the appropriate control filter. In addition, a theoretical analysis of the optimal control filter in reverberant environments is presented, highlighting the importance of 3D spatially conditioned control filter design. Evaluations using both simulated and measured acoustic paths demonstrate that the CRNN is robust to unseen acoustic environments and noise types. Furthermore, the results confirm that SF-GFANC outperforms representative ANC algorithms when handling noise sources across diverse 3D locations and frequency characteristics in reverberant environments.

papers.title_en: Low-Altitude ISAC With Spherical Directly-Connected Antenna Array: Performance Analysis and Beamforming Optimization
papers.authors: Zhiqiang Xiao, Tao Zhang, Zhenjun Dong, Hao Wu, Xiaoqiang Qiao, Jianhua Zhang
papers.evidence: 球面天线阵列几何设计和波束成形优化用于集成感知与通信
papers.tldr: 针对低空经济对鲁棒空域监控的需求，传统天线阵列存在三维覆盖受限和高仰角角分辨率下降的问题。本文提出球形直接连接天线阵列（DCAA），由多个无移相器的简单均匀平面阵列布置于球面，实现全三维覆盖、均匀角分辨率及低成本。首先分析其感知性能（信噪比、检测概率、克拉美罗界），然后建立优化模型最大化最差感知信噪比并保障通信服务质量，设计贪心联合阵列选择与波束赋形算法。仿真表明DCAA在感知覆盖、角度估计精度和通感信噪比权衡上显著优于传统均匀平面阵列。
papers.abstract_en: The safety development requirements of low-altitude economy (LAE) renders the robust low-altitude airspace monitoring critical important than ever before. Integrated sensing and communication (ISAC) as one of the key development trends of 6G provides potential solutions for the LAE. However, conventional antenna arrays suffer from limited three-dimensional (3D) sensing coverage and degraded angular resolution at high elevation angles. To address these challenges, this paper investigates low-altitude ISAC systems enabled by the recently proposed spherical directly-connected antenna array (DCAA). By carefully deploying multiple simple uniform planar arrays (sUPAs) over a spherical surface, without relying on any phase shifter, spherical DCAA enjoys advantages of full 3D coverage, superior and uniform angular resolution, enhanced energy-focusing and low hardware cost. In this paper, we first characterizes the sensing performance of the spherical DCAA, in terms of the sensing signal-to-noise ratio (SNR), area average probability of detection, and Cramér-Rao lower bounds (CRLBs) for both elevation and azimuth angle estimation. Then, a low-altitude ISAC optimization problem is formulated to maximize the worst-case sensing SNR over a prescribed aerial region while satisfying the communication quality-of-service requirements of ground users. To effective solve this mixed-integer non-convex problem, we develop a novel greed-based joint array selection and beamforming optimization framework. Simulation results demonstrate that spherical DCAA significantly outperforms conventional UPA in terms of sensing coverage, angle estimation accuracy, and communication-sensing SNR tradeoff, highlighting its potential for future low-altitude ISAC systems.

papers.title_en: Investigating the Integration of Spatial Information in Foundation-Model-Based Speaker Diarization
papers.authors: Marc Deegen, Adrian Meise, Reinhold Haeb-Umbach
papers.evidence: 多通道空间特征集成用于日记化，涉及波束成形前端
papers.tldr: 多通道空间信息对说话人日志有益，但单通道基础模型（如WavLM）已取得最优性能。本文对比三种空间特征集成方式：波束成形+单通道模型、多通道基础模型、下游网络条件化空间特征。发现波束成形在重叠语音区反而有害，条件化方法性能最佳。错误分析表明条件化系统有效减少了仅用频谱或空间特征时的错误，为空间信息与基础模型融合提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Spatial information gleaned from multi-channel input has been shown to lead to improvements in meeting processing tasks like diarization and source separation. At the same time, diarization based on features extracted by large pretrained single-channel foundation models, such as WavLM, achieved state-of-the-art performance. This work compares three approaches to integrate spatial features into foundation model-based diarization systems: the cascade of a beamformer and a single-channel foundation model, a multi-channel foundation model, and the conditioning of the downstream network on explicitly extracted spatial features. Results show that the beamformer front-end is even detrimental to diarization performance in regions of overlapped speech, while best performance is achieved with the conditioning, demonstrating that the incorporation of explicit spatial features is a competitive approach to foundation-model-supported diarization. This approach is further subjected to a detailed error analysis showing that the conditioning system removes errors to a good extent that would occur when either only spectral or only spatial features were used.
